fullQuery:
You are a writing assistant. Your role is to modify user text according to their queries.
You MUST NOT add greetings, explanations, confirmations, or follow-up offers. 
When responding, start DIRECTLY with the transformed text. Do not include labels, headings, or introductions.
ALWAYS answer in English!

Example
---------

User prompt:
Make this text sound better and fix my grammar

Text:
Main advantage of the transformer architecture lays in the ability to handle long-range dependences between different parts of text.

Revision:
The main advantage of the transformer architecture lies in its ability to handle long-range dependencies between different parts of a text.

Your turn
---------
User prompt:
Explan
Text:
Claude code and co. are increasing the rate of software development, and these AI coding agents are opening the door to more people to implement their ideas without the need of deep expertise. This will eventually lead to more innovation and products that benefit society at large. Especially worldwide, where access to formal education is more limited, and even the available education does not provide all the necessary skills for developing quality software

However, writing code is only part of the equation. The other, more important part in on opinion, is the quality of the user experience. This is something that AI agent cannot do on their own, because it by definition needs humans in the loop that interact with the system, and give feedback to the developers to improve the experience of using the software.
Revision:

response: Claude Code and Co. are enhancing the pace of software development, and these AI coding agents are making it easier for more people to implement their ideas without deep expertise. This will eventually lead to increased innovation and products that benefit society at large, especially in regions where access to formal education is limited or does not provide all necessary skills for developing quality software.\n\nHowever, writing code is just one part of the equation; the other, arguably more crucial aspect, involves the quality of the user experience. This requires human interaction with the system to provide feedback that developers can use to improve the software’s usability.

query: Add a conclusion and a takeaway
fullQuery:
You are a writing assistant. Your role is to continue user text according to their queries.
You MUST NOT add greetings, explanations, confirmations, or follow-up offers.
DO NOT repeat user text, just continue it.
ALWAYS answer in English!

Example
---------

User prompt:
Write an argument to support my claim.

Text:
In my opinion, the transformers architecture was revolutionary for natural language processing. The reason for that is

Continuation:
the fundamental change of how models understand and generate language. Unlike previous architectures such as RNNs or LSTMs, transformers rely entirely on self-attention mechanisms, allowing them to capture long-range dependencies and contextual relationships within text more effectively.

Your turn
----------

User prompt:
Add a conclusion and a takeaway
Text:
Claude Code and Co. are accelerating the pace of software development by leveraging AI coding agents, making it easier for individuals without deep technical expertise to implement their ideas. This shift will foster increased innovation and produce products that benefit society broadly, particularly in regions where access to formal education is limited or insufficient to provide the necessary skills for developing high-quality software, thus significantly impacting global technological advancement.

Moreover, while writing code remains a critical component of this process, the quality of the user experience (UX) holds equal importance. To achieve superior UX, human interaction with the system is essential to gather feedback that developers can use to enhance the software’s usability and overall functionality, thereby ensuring a positive impact on end-users.

Additionally, integrating AI coding agents into the development process not only democratizes access to advanced coding tools but also necessitates a collaborative approach between AI and human contributors. This synergy ensures that both technical and user-centric aspects are effectively addressed, leading to more robust and user-friendly applications, ultimately enhancing overall product effectiveness and user satisfaction.

Continuation:

response: In summary, the integration of AI coding agents into software development at Claude Code and Co. is transforming the industry by fostering innovation and accessibility. By combining the strengths of artificial intelligence with human expertise, this approach not only democratizes advanced coding tools but also ensures that end-user needs are met effectively. This collaborative model will drive global technological advancement and improve product quality, making it a pivotal strategy for the future of software development.\n\nThe key takeaway is that successful software projects in the modern era require a balanced approach that leverages AI’s efficiency with human creativity and user-centric design. By embracing this paradigm, organizations can unlock new levels of innovation and deliver solutions that truly resonate with diverse user bases worldwide.

text: In summary, the integration of AI coding agents into software development at Claude Code and Co. is transforming the industry by fostering innovation and accessibility. By combining the strengths of artificial intelligence with human expertise, this approach not only democratizes advanced coding tools but also ensures that end-user needs are met effectively. This collaborative model will drive global technological advancement and improve product quality, making it a pivotal strategy for the future of software development.

The key takeaway is that successful software projects in the modern era require a balanced approach that leverages AI’s efficiency with human creativity and user-centric design. By embracing this paradigm, organizations can unlock new levels of innovation and deliver solutions that truly resonate with diverse user bases worldwide.
